fields.name: Slightly Askew Winery
fields.description: Quirky downtown winery with fun atmosphere and creative wine names, known for hosting live music events

fields.name: Childress Vineyards

fields.description: Beautiful winery offering excellent red and white wines in a scenic setting

fields.name: Angry Troll Brewing Elkin
fields.address: 222 E Main St, Elkin, NC 28621, USA

fields.name: Mountain Brook Vineyards

fields.name: Sanders Ridge Vineyard & Winery
fields.description: Mountain vineyard offering stunning views and excellent wines

fields.address: 210 E Cherokee St, Blacksburg, SC 29702, USA

fields.address: 2550 Shadow Line Ln, Granite Falls, NC 28630, USA

fields.address: 9557 Linville Falls Hwy, Newland, NC 28657, USA

fields.description: Beautiful vineyard known for excellent varietals and welcoming tasting room

fields.name: Wellborn Winery
fields.address: 254 Mush Creek Rd, Travelers Rest, SC 29690, USA

fields.name: Elkin Creek Vineyard and Winery
fields.description: Scenic winery with relaxed atmosphere, perfect for ending your wine adventure

fields.name: JOLO Winery and Vineyards with End Posts Restaurant
Shadow Springs Vineyard
fields.description: Intimate vineyard perfect for a romantic finale, smaller and more personal with acoustic music on weekends.

fields.name: Adagio Vineyards
fields.description: Intimate winery known for excellent varietals and welcoming atmosphere

fields.name: Davesté Vineyards
fields.address: 155 Lytton Farm Rd, Troutman, NC 28166, USA

fields.name: Carolina Heritage Vineyard & Winery
fields.description: Beautiful vineyard offering both reds and whites in the heart of Yadkin Valley

fields.name: Castello Barone Vineyards and Winery
fields.description: Italian-inspired winery offering sophisticated dry wines with acoustic performances

fields.name: 10 Year Vine Bottle
fields.description: 10th Anniversary Red Wine Blend with deep notes of dark cherry, blackberry, licorice and baking spice. Palate lavished with dark fruit, toasted oak and spice with velvety tannins.

fields.name: 2022 Pilot Fog
fields.description: Elegant and concentrated red wine with aromas of dark cherry and plum framed by vanilla bean and shaved chocolate. Velvety palate with bramble fruit, cherry, spice, and cracked pepper.

fields.name: 10 Year X Bottle
fields.description: 10th Anniversary Red Wine Blend with deep notes of dark cherry, blackberry, licorice and baking spice. Palate lavished with dark fruit, toasted oak and spice with velvety tannins.

fields.name: 2022 Pilot Fog
fields.description: Elegant and concentrated red wine with aromas of dark cherry and plum framed by vanilla bean and shaved chocolate. The velvety palate sings with bramble fruit, cherry, spice, and cracked pepper.

fields.name: 2024 Sauvignon Blanc
fields.description: Crisp, vibrant, and elegant with flavors of green apple, stone fruit, and citrus. Lean and focused with a refreshing, mouthwatering mineral finish.

fields.name: SaiSun Y'all
fields.description: Our summer beer, true to the saison beer style. (ABV: 6.7%)

fields.name: 2023 Crimson Creek
fields.description: Yadkin Valley Chambourcin with enchanting notes of cherry, cranberry, spice, and turned earth. A juicy palate of berries, baking spice and herbs framed by polished tannins.

fields.name: 2023 Carolus XII
fields.description: Premier wine offering paying homage to North Carolina. Named after King Charles with XII signifying North Carolina was the 12th colony to join the original 13 colonies.

fields.name: 2023 Carolus XII
fields.description: Premier wine offering paying homage to North Carolina. Named for King Charles with XII signifying North Carolina as the 12th colony to join the original 13 colonies.

fields.name: 2023 Rkatsiteli
fields.description: Dry and medium-bodied with moderate acidity. Aromas of acacia blossom and orange zest with flavors of white peach and honeydew.

fields.name: 2024 Vidal Blanc
fields.description: Enjoy our exquisite Vidal Blanc, where the essence of crushed stone, pineapple, and fresh pear intertwine with hints of white flowers. On the palate, experience a tantalizing burst of juiciness and vibrancy, accentuated by flavors of tropical fruits with a subtle touch of minerals.

fields.name: KAN-GRIA
fields.description: Our canned sangria thats boasting tropical fruit, citrus & a mild effervescence.

fields.name: 2023 Loco Lulu White
fields.description: Through this blend of two delicious aromatic white varietals come notes of flint, peach and honeysuckle that open nicely in the glass. A medium bodied white wine that builds fresh peach and gooseberry on the palate, and finishes with a pleasant salinity.

fields.name: Elevage Rouge
fields.description: Indulge in this exquisite red blend, where vibrant notes of plum, raspberry, and cedar harmonize with enticing hints of baking spice. Experience a burst of red fruit and lively acidity that dances on your palate, enveloped in a luxurious, velvety texture.

fields.name: 2022 Traminette
fields.description: Floral and spicy aromas combine with flavors of lychee, elderflower, honey, and apricot on the palate. A hint of residual sugar provides slight sweetness upfront but finishes dry.

fields.name: 2023 Golden Hallows Reserve
fields.description: Fermented in French and American oak barrels for eleven months. Generous aromas of cooked pineapple, pear, toast, and minerals with lemon filling, stone fruit, and citrus zest.

fields.name: Blueberry Wine
fields.description: Fruit wine made from blueberries provided by local growers.

fields.name: 2022 Cabernet Sauvignon
fields.description: Complex and rich cooler climate Cabernet Sauvignon with enticing aromas of plum, dark cherry, and bramble fruit with wafts of baking spice, caramel, and violets.

fields.name: 2023 Chardonnay
fields.description: Fermented on the lees this Chardonnay has hints of honeydew and melons on the nose with light citrus flavors on the palette. It is crisp, refreshing and has a smooth full finish.

fields.name: 2023 Loco Lulu Rosé
fields.description: Pouring a lovely pink salmon hue, this rosé of Cabernet Franc and Sauvignon has aromas of rose, fresh strawberry, and hard shell candy. A very fresh, off-dry wine that pops notes of fig and red berry fruits and finishes with a clean minerality.

fields.name: Camilla Vienna Lager
fields.description: A beautifully reddish, toasty Vienna Lager with the approachable sweetness and bready warmth that made Mexican Lagers legendary with a crisp, clean finish. Sessionable, smooth, and impossible not to love. (ABV: 5.1%)

fields.name: 2024 Esté Sparkling White Wine
fields.description: A Traminette-based blend with floral aromas of jasmine and rose, leading to notes of tropical fruit and honey on the palate. Bright and effervescent, this wine finishes with refreshing acidity.

fields.name: 2025 Twinkles
fields.description: Crisp, well balanced sparkling wine with vibrant aromas of red berries, clementine peel, white flowers and citrus zest. Hints of stone fruit, citrus and white fruit with twinkle of citrus.

fields.name: 2024 Pea Ridge Red
fields.description: Blend of Chambourcin and Petit Verdot showing notes of black cherry, plum and milk chocolate on the palate. Well-integrated tannins make this wine flexible with all sorts of food pairings.

fields.name: Leon Millot
fields.description: French-American hybrid grape variety grown at the vineyard that pairs well with the upstate South Carolina terroir.

fields.name: 2024 Twinkles
fields.description: Crisp well-balanced sparkling wine with vibrant aromas of white peach, clementine peel, white flowers, and citrus zest. Hints of peach skin, citrus, and crisp apple with a twinkle of citrus.

fields.name: 2022 Chardonnay Reserve
fields.description: Pronounced butter and oak combine with flavors of yellow peach, pineapple, and vanilla. Full-bodied and textured with a lengthy finish.

fields.name: Peach Wine
fields.description: Fruit wine made from peaches supplied by farmers in Marietta, Greer, Chesnee, and Gaffney.

fields.name: 2023 JOLOTAGE
fields.description: Vibrant aromatics of bright red fruit with pomegranate and spices. Well-integrated red fruit with hints of cedar, leather, and pepper with polished yet firm tannins.

fields.name: Happy Endings
fields.description: Masterful blend of three vintages of Traminette and Vidal Blanc wines sweetened using ancient German Süßreserve technique. Delicately sweet, vibrant wine with classic winemaking traditions.

fields.name: 2023 Petit Manseng
fields.description: The signature white varietal of Parker-Binns opens with powerful aromas of ripe orange, mango, brioche, and granite. The full body, crisp acidity, and round finish bring hints of pineapple, cantaloupe and cobbler to life on the palate.

fields.name: Lenoir
fields.description: Uniquely South Carolinian grape variety provided by a local grower.

fields.name: RARA SISBOOMBAH 7th Edition
fields.description: Bold and harmonious symphony showcasing Petit Verdot, Cabernet Sauvignon, Sagrantino, and Chambourcin. Deep garnet with aromas of wild blackberry, black cherry compote, dried sage, and violet petals.

fields.name: 2022 Dessert Petit Manseng
fields.description: This split-ferment of oak and stainless steel features profound aromas of vanilla, baking spice, ginseng, honey, and ripe tropical fruits. Segway to flavors that remind us of grilled, spiced pineapple consistent with Brazilian steakhouses around the world.

fields.name: 2024 Petit Verdot
fields.description: This complex Petit Verdot presents its dark complexion with notes of plums, blackberries, blueberries, and toasted oak. Rich and sumptuous with a medium to full body, this wine is layered with flavors of dark fruit, minerals, slate, spices, and caramel.

fields.name: Sweet Vermouth
fields.description: A proprietary blend specifically for Cuvee Premier Club Members. Boasts aromas of blueberry pie, blackberry and dark cherry with spice and chocolate.

fields.name: 2023 Merlot
fields.description: Elegant expression of a colder climate Merlot with enchanting aromas of baked plum and berries, cracked pepper, and spice. The palate is lavished with cooked red fruit and hints of baked plum pie.

fields.name: 2023 Cuvee Selection
fields.description: Represents the very best the winery has to offer. Wafts of pomegranate, blueberry preserves, and ripe cherry with dark fruit, mineral, caramel and baking spice.

fields.name: 2022 Cabernet Sauvignon
fields.description: Complex and rich cooler climate Cabernet Sauvignon with enticing aromas of plum, dark cherry, and bramble fruit with baking spice, caramel, and violets.

fields.name: O.H.W.
fields.description: This blueberry wine is rich, velvety and delicious. Notes of blueberry pie, baking spice, and shaved dark chocolate entice the palate for what follows. The palate is soft and supple with notes of blueberry compote, vanilla and spice.

fields.name: 2025 Pink
fields.description: Crisp and elegant Rosé wine layered with enticing aromas of ripe strawberry and melon.

fields.name: 2023 Golden Hallows Reserve
fields.description: Fermented in French and American oak barrels for eleven months. Generous aromas of cooked pineapple, pear, toast, and minerals with lemon filling, stone fruit, citrus zest, and a hint of flint and nutmeg.

fields.name: SUNRISE Sparkling Riesling
fields.description: Refreshing mountain grown sparkling wine

fields.name: Elevage Blanc
fields.description: Indulge in our exquisite white blend, where the essence of crushed stone, steel, and fresh pear intertwines with hints of pineapple. On the palate, experience a tantalizing burst of juiciness and vibrancy, accentuated by flavors of white fruit with a subtle touch of lychee.

fields.name: Slut Dog Sin
fields.description: Bursts of flavorful fruit to the palate make this wine truly sinful. This delightful yet healthy wine is loaded with flavors of Raspberries and Acai berries.

fields.name: Strawberry Wine
fields.description: Fruit wine made from strawberries supplied by farmers in Marietta, Greer, Chesnee, and Gaffney.

fields.name: 2023 Artista Rosé
fields.description: A fruit forward Barbera Rosé with a full body and dry finish.

fields.name: 2023 Loco Lulu Red
fields.description: A bright, ruby color wine with distinct aromas of cranberry, fresh red berries, and a hint of spice. A smooth, soft, mouthfeel features softer, refined tannins and a balanced acidity that brightens the intense and inviting red fruit character.

fields.name: 2022 Roaring River Red
fields.description: Subtle earthy notes of this Merlot are balanced with youthful tannins and bright acidity integrated thoroughly to its finish. Mild spice notes of black peppercorn and dried herbs complement and meld with nuanced oak and fruit flavors of red current and red plum.

fields.name: Spiker Dude
fields.description: Fresh and zesty with a "Spike" of lime notes and is perfectly balanced with the subtle flavors of coconut and citrus. The perfect wine for summer refreshment!

fields.name: Peachie Keen
fields.description: Crisp, refreshing and luscious! Bursting with flavors of ripe juicy peaches, this delicious wine will have your taste buds feeling "Peachie Keen."

fields.name: 2022 Silhouette
fields.description: Deep violet in color with aromas of dark fruit, vanilla, and cinnamon stick. Flavors of plum, Bing cherry, and balanced oak notes with smooth tannins.

fields.name: 2022 Cordeaux
fields.description: Tannic and Dark. Meant for Aging. This deeply colored red grape blend contains Petit Verdot, Tannat, and Merlot with high levels of antioxidants.

fields.name: 2023 Pilot Shadow
fields.description: Extraordinary red wine with deep aromas of ripe berry compote entwined with notes of leather and spice. The palate is a sumptuous tapestry of velvety red fruits, mocha, and vanilla.

fields.name: 2022 Pinot Grigio
fields.description: Mild floral aromas combined with lime and a hint of almond. On the palate are flavors of nectarine, pear, and Meyer lemon with brilliant acidity.

fields.name: USC-Davis Cabernet Style
fields.description: Specially-bred USC-Davis vines similar to Cabernet Sauvignon, exclusively provided by an upstate grower.

fields.name: 2022 Devil's Hill
fields.description: From a devilishly difficult hillside at 1024 feet above sea level. Rustic quality with aromatics of dark cherry, shortbread cookie, spice, forest floor, crushed stone, and dark chocolate.

fields.name: 2024 Bourbon Barrel Aged Cabernet Sauvignon
fields.description: Aged in French oak then finished in freshly used bourbon barrels for 8 weeks. Notes of cherry pie filling, baking spices, and charred toffee.

fields.name: RARA SISBOOMBAH 7th Edition
fields.description: Bold and harmonious symphony showcasing Petit Verdot, Cabernet Sauvignon, Sagrantino, and Chambourcin. Deep garnet hue with seductive aromas of wild blackberry, black cherry compote, dried sage, and violet petals.

fields.name: Cardinal Cin
fields.description: You've been naughty this year. Cardinal Cin is a semi-sweet cinnamon infused cider with amazing cherry and cinnamon aroma. The bull is delivering one penance you can enjoy with gluttony! (ABV: 6.0%)

fields.name: 2023 Pilot Shadow
fields.description: Extraordinary red wine with deep aromas of ripe berry compote with leather and spice. Sumptuous tapestry of velvety red fruits, mocha, and vanilla with herbal essence.

fields.name: 2022 Cabernet Franc
fields.description: Pouring a vibrant ruby in the glass, this Cabernet Franc shows true varietal aromas of rose petal and graphite, followed by a touch of oak. Framed with fresh acidity and bright red fruit, this elegant wine pairs well with a cool Autumn afternoon.

fields.name: 2022 Merlot
fields.description: A blend of 3 vintages of Merlot from our estate. Medium core and garnet to show some youth, this wine opens with notes of dried herbs, red licorice and ripe plum. On first sip, you find this to be a very round, full bodied wine that has cherry, baking spice, and cola all along the finish.

fields.name: 2024 Chardonnay
fields.description: Indulge in the rich flavors of our barrel-aged Chardonnay, meticulously crafted from grapes nurtured in the North Carolina sun. With captivating aromas of stone fruit and citrus framed by toasted oak and roasted nuts this wine offers a velvety mouthfeel, a juicy palate and a lingering finish.

fields.name: 2024 Twinkles
fields.description: Crisp well-balanced sparkling wine layered with vibrant aromas of white peach, clementine peel, white flowers, and citrus zest. Hints of peach skin, citrus, and crisp apple with a twinkle of citrus.

fields.name: Trip In The Woods Barrel-Aged Narfoot
Catawba
fields.description: Native American grape variety that pairs well with the French-American hybrids in unique blends.

fields.name: 2023 JOLOTAGE
fields.description: Presents vibrant aromatics of bright red fruit, highlighted by pomegranate and subtle spices. Well-integrated red fruit with vibrant acidity, complemented by hints of cedar, leather, and pepper.

fields.name: 2024 Crimson Creek
fields.description: French American hybrid handcrafted in French tradition. Complex wine with enchanting notes of cherry, cranberry, pomegranate, and spice with polished tannins and elegant finish.

fields.name: 2023 Cabernet Franc
fields.description: An acid-driven style that's refreshing and easy to drink. Aromas of raspberries and blackberries are accented with toasted French oak and smooth tannins.

fields.name: 10 Year X Bottle
fields.description: 10th Anniversary Red Wine Blend with deep, luscious notes of dark cherry, blackberry, licorice and baking spice. The palate is lavished with dark fruit, toasted oak and spice with velvety tannins.

fields.name: 2023 Red Barn Blend
fields.description: This unique blend of Merlot, Syrah, and Sangiovese is rich in aromas of black currant, raspberry, and a hint of cherry. Oak, plum, and black pepper flavors are complemented by the medium body and dry finish.

fields.name: 2021 Cabernet Franc
fields.description: Aromas of coffee and chocolate. Flavors of blackberry and plum. Medium tannins.

fields.name: 2023 Cuvee Selection
fields.description: Represents the very best the winery has to offer. Wafts of pomegranate, blueberry preserves, and ripe cherry with hints of dark fruit, mineral, caramel and baking spice.

fields.name: JOLOTAGE Reserve 4 Edition
fields.description: Fourth bottling of JOLOTAGE Reserve representing the very best blend. Slowly reveals itself with layers of red fruit, leather, iron, and tobacco with strawberry jam, herbs, and spices.

fields.name: 2024 Rkatsiteli
fields.description: This ancient grape produced an enchanting wine. The aromas of crushed stone, peach skin, and fresh apple dance with hints of honeysuckle. On the palate, experience a tantalizing burst of vibrancy, accentuated by flavors of stone fruit with a subtle touch of spice.

fields.name: JOLOTAGE Reserve 4 Edition
fields.description: Fourth bottling of JOLOTAGE Reserve with extended barrel aging and blending of different vintages. Layers of red fruit, leather, iron, and tobacco with strawberry jam, herbs, and spices.

fields.name: 10 Year Vine Bottle
fields.description: 10th Anniversary Red Wine Blend with deep, luscious notes of dark cherry, blackberry, licorice and baking spice. The palate is lavished with dark fruit, toasted oak and spice with velvety tannins.

fields.name: 2022 Pick of the Litter
fields.description: Blend of Malbec 70% and Merlot 30%, which come together to produce a truly balanced and versatile red wine. This is a medium-bodied red which is anchored by deep tannins that complement and enhance the meaty and savory flavors.

fields.name: Traminette
fields.description: French-American hybrid grape variety grown at the vineyard that thrives in the upstate climate.

fields.name: Party Kilt
fields.description: A rich, deeply malty Wee Heavy boasting a stunning burnt caramel hue and a silky-smooth molasses finish that lingers just long enough. Sweet, warming, and undeniably indulgent - a proper Scottish celebration in a glass. (ABV: 6.5%)

fields.name: 2024 Crimson Creek
fields.description: Yadkin Valley Chambourcin with enchanting notes of cherry, cranberry, pomegranate, & spice. A juicy palate of berries, baking spice and herbs framed by polished tannins and vibrancy.

fields.name: Seyval Blanc
fields.description: French-American hybrid grape variety grown at the vineyard that pairs well with the upstate South Carolina terroir.

fields.name: Sangria
fields.description: A proprietary blend of JOLO barrel aged wine, citrus and fruit juices. Rich and complex bursting with cherry, plum, citrus and mocha enhanced by a slight fizz.

fields.name: 2022 The Watchman
fields.description: This full-bodied, flavorful wine opens with aromas of dark chocolate, dried cherry and lavender. This wine has rounded tannins with a dry finish filled with dried fruit, smoke and black pepper.

fields.name: Muddy Paws Solera 6
fields.description: Port style dessert wine made using Solera method combining vintages 2017-2023. Yields notes of fig, prune, toasted nuts, caramel & spices with rich & luxurious palate of raisins, figs & plum pie.

fields.name: 2024 Rosé
fields.description: The free run juice of our combined red grapes takes this pale Provencal style Rose to an elevated level. Dry, crisp acidity with harmonious notes of strawberry, kiwi, and honeydew melon, fresh as a Summer day!!

fields.name: 2023 Pea Ridge Red
fields.description: Dual vintage blend of Merlot, Cabernet Sauvignon and Cabernet Franc, showing off aromas of ripe brambles and raspberry preserves with rich earthiness on the finish.

fields.name: Cabernet Sauvignon
fields.description: Our Cabernet Sauvignon captivates with enchanting aromas of ripe bramble fruit, cedar, and delicate dried rose petals. On the palate, it delivers a rich yet vibrant experience, unfolding layers of dark fruit with remarkable depth and complexity.

fields.name: Sangria
fields.description: A proprietary blend of JOLO barrel aged wine, citrus and fruit juices. Rich and complex bursting with cherry, plum, citrus and mocha enhanced by a slight fizz.

fields.name: 2025 Twinkles
fields.description: Crisp, well balanced sparkling wine layered with vibrant aromas of red berries, clementine peel, white flowers and citrus zest. Hints of stone fruit, citrus and white fruit with a twinkle of citrus.

fields.name: Concord
fields.description: Native American grape variety that pairs well with the French-American hybrids in unique blends.

fields.name: 2023 Chardonnay
fields.description: A beautiful crisp naked Chardonnay with aromas of pear and star fruit. This wine is medium bodied and full of ripe pear, pineapple and peach preserve on the finish.

fields.name: SUNSET Sparkling Rose
fields.description: Just awarded Best Sparkling Wine at NC Fine Wine Competition

fields.name: 2022 Chambourcin
fields.description: Light oak and smokey. Medium body with flavors of plum and wild berries.

fields.name: Tattoo on the Beach
fields.description: Lively flavors of juicy peach, ripe apricot and fresh orange. Perfect for refreshing summer sipping!

fields.name: 2025 Golden Hallows
fields.description: Crisp, clean, and refreshing with aromatics of orange blossom, pineapple, stone fruits, apple, and white flowers. Hints of pear, honey-crisp apple, tropical fruits, and citrus zest.

fields.name: Reel Good
fields.description: This light and delicious wine contains flavors of fresh picked strawberries and other tropical fruits. The name says it all, it's simply "Reel Good" wine.

fields.name: 2022 La Brisa
fields.description: 100% Riesling with notes of melon, honeysuckle, and ripe peaches. Crisp acidity is balanced with a touch of sweetness.

fields.name: 2022 Devil's Hill
fields.description: Named after the devilishly difficult hillside where varieties are grown. Has a rustic quality with aromatics and flavors of dark cherry, shortbread cookie, spice, forest floor, crushed stone, and dark chocolate.

fields.name: Muscadine
fields.description: Native American grape variety that pairs well with the French-American hybrids in unique blends.

fields.name: 2023 Barrel Chardonnay
fields.description: Our Barrel Chardonnay is aged in French Oak barrels for only a couple months adding a bit of complexity yet remaining crisp and refreshing. There are floral tropical notes of pineapple and stone fruits on the palette.

fields.name: 2025 Golden Hallows
fields.description: Crisp, clean, and refreshing with aromatics of orange blossom, pineapple, stone fruits, apple, and white flowers. Hints of pear, honey-crisp apple, tropical fruits, and citrus zest.

fields.name: Blackberry Wine
fields.description: Fruit wine made from blackberries provided by local growers.

fields.name: 2023 Crimson Creek
fields.description: French American hybrid handcrafted in French tradition. Complex wine with enchanting notes of cherry, cranberry, spice, and turned earth with polished tannins.

fields.name: Happy Endings
fields.description: Masterful blend of three different vintages of Traminette and Vidal Blanc wines sweetened using ancient German Süßreserve technique. Delicately sweet, vibrant wine with nod to classic German winemaking traditions.

fields.name: Chambourcin
fields.description: French-American hybrid grape variety grown at the vineyard that thrives in the upstate climate.

fields.name: 2022 Chambourcin
fields.description: Lighter in style and lower in tannin, aged in neutral French oak barrels. Has notes of cherry, plum and a hint of spice.

fields.name: 2024 Holiday Hound
fields.description: Our delicious pomegranate (Nasty Bastard) blended with Acai Raspberry (Slut DOG Sin) makes a delightful holiday blend and kick it up with your favorite sparkling wine for a wonderful Holiday cocktail.

fields.name: 2023 Merlot
fields.description: Elegant expression of cooler climate Merlot with enchanting aromas of baked plum and berries, cracked pepper, and spice. Velvety and sumptuous texture with polished tannins.

fields.name: Summer Daze
fields.description: This refreshing blush wine presents all the characteristics of sliced fresh watermelon. Balanced with thirst quenching crispness and juicy sweetness.

fields.name: 2023 Reserve Chardonnay
fields.description: 100% fermented in barrel, aged sur lie, and put through a full malolactic conversion. Very expressive with vanilla, butter, and spice on the nose, with a full-body, fresh acidity, and dry finish. The flavors that linger remind us of cream, coconut, popcorn, and a delicious savory foundation.

fields.name: 2023 Barbera
fields.description: Our Barbera is back! Flavors of dark cherries with a hint of chocolate on the palette. Long lingering finish!

fields.name: 2025 Pink
fields.description: Crisp and elegant Rosé wine layered with enticing aromas of ripe strawberry, melon.

fields.name: Black Jack BJ
fields.description: Named after our past Field Champion dog, " BJ". Enhanced with flavors of fresh blackberries, this wine provides a unique twist on merlot.

fields.name: 2024 Nasty Bastard
fields.description: In heartfelt memory of our dog "Walker" This wine brings together juicy and sweet flavors of wild berries & pomegranates for an exciting taste.

fields.name: Dulcinea
fields.description: A semi-sweet red blend with notes of black currants, blackberries and a lingering toffee finish. Serve chilled or at room temperature.

fields.name: 2023 Maggie
fields.description: Pouring a pale green in the glass, this vintage of Maggie bursts with grassy, peach, and gooseberry notes on the nose. The first sip opens your senses with fresh pear, pineapple, orange blossom, and a touch of minerality.

fields.name: 2024 Riesling
fields.description: This dry Riesling captivates with notes of stone fruit and white flowers. Flavors of ripe apple, pear, and apricot dance on the palate, complemented by a subtle floral undertone.

fields.name: Founders Reserve 2nd Edition
fields.description: This multi-vintage red wine offers aromatic layers of dark fruit, raisin, cedar, spice, and caramel. The palate is rich and luxurious, featuring vibrant blue fruit, a hint of raisin and prune, and a mouthwatering finish, all framed by plush, well-integrated tannins.

fields.name: Sweet Vermouth
fields.description: A proprietary blend specifically for the Cuvee, Premier Club Members. Boasts aromas of blueberry pie, blackberry and dark cherry with spice and chocolate.

fields.name: Stay Classy Elkin
fields.description: A light, crisp, and clean American IPA that keeps it simple and does it right - bright citrus and classic pine hops delivering a refreshing, no-fuss bite. easy drinking enough to have a few, classy enough to mean it. (ABV: 6.5%)

fields.name: 2021 Ambrosia
fields.description: Comprised of a blend of Muscat grapes with aromas of floral orange blossom and notes of ripe pineapple and peach. Sweet with a long, smooth finish.

fields.name: Chardonel
fields.description: French-American hybrid grape variety grown at the vineyard that pairs well with the upstate South Carolina terroir.

fields.name: 2024 Pearl D' Blanc
fields.description: This sparkling wine dazzles with its fresh, invigorating profile and delicate elegance. On the nose, enticing aromas of tropical fruits like pineapple and guava mingle harmoniously with subtle hints of white flowers, creating a bouquet that is both vibrant and refined.

fields.name: 2023 Dessert Blackberry
fields.description: Screaming yummy, 100% Blackberry, 18% alcohol, serve chilled with dessert, on dessert, or as dessert!

fields.name: Muddy Paws Solera 6
fields.description: Port style dessert wine made using Solera method combining vintages 2017-2023. Notes of fig, prune, toasted nuts, caramel and spices with rich palate of raisins, figs and plum pie.

fields.name: 2022 Cabernet Sauvignon
fields.description: Red fruit, white pepper, cedar, and a hint of vanilla. This wine has approachable tannins and is smooth on the palate.

fields.name: 2022 MYSTIC Vision
fields.description: This dry, medium-body wine boasts intense aromas of red currants, black raspberries, hints of oak, and pepper spice, with rounded tannins and a toasted vanilla finish.

fields.name: 2022 Portrait
fields.description: Bordeaux-style blend with aromas of violets and herbs leading to notes of plums, black currants, and cedar. 50% Cabernet Sauvignon, 30% Merlot, and 20% Cabernet Franc.

items.name: 2023 Barrel Chardonnay
items.tasting_tip: Start with this oak-kissed white to awaken your palate with its tropical and stone fruit notes that you love.

items.name: 2023 Barbera
items.tasting_tip: Notice how the dark cherry and chocolate flavors align perfectly with your preferred flavor profile.

items.name: 2022 Chambourcin
items.tasting_tip: This lesser-known varietal offers the plum and berry complexity you enjoy while challenging your adventurous palate with smoky oak nuances.

items.name: 2021 Cabernet Franc
items.tasting_tip: End with this bold expression featuring your favorite blackberry, plum, coffee and chocolate notes in perfect harmony.

flight.description: A journey through medium to full-bodied wines showcasing your beloved dark fruit flavors while exploring unique varietals and blends.

pairings.tip: Decant for 30 minutes to let the dark fruit flavors fully develop
pairings.why: The coffee and chocolate aromas complement herb-crusted meats while the blackberry and plum flavors enhance rich desserts.
pairings.pairs_with: Grilled lamb chops with rosemary or dark chocolate tart

pairings.tip: Serve slightly below room temperature to highlight the wine's natural acidity
pairings.why: The dark cherry flavors and chocolate hints pair beautifully with earthy mushrooms and rich braised meats.
pairings.pairs_with: Mushroom risotto or beef short ribs

pairings.tip: Chill to 50-55°F to balance the oak integration with the fruit flavors
pairings.why: The tropical pineapple and stone fruit notes complement seafood and poultry while the French oak adds complexity to match richer preparations.
pairings.pairs_with: Lobster with butter sauce or grilled chicken with tropical fruit salsa

pairings.tip: Let this blend breathe for 15 minutes to allow the different varietals to harmonize
pairings.why: The complex blend of three varietals with black pepper and plum flavors matches the variety of cured meats and bold, spiced dishes.
pairings.pairs_with: Charcuterie board with aged cheeses or peppercorn-crusted steak

pairings.tip: This hybrid grape variety showcases best when paired with bold, smoky flavors
pairings.why: The smoky oak character and wild berry flavors complement barbecue spices and gamey meats perfectly.
pairings.pairs_with: BBQ pulled pork or wild game like venison

pairings.general_tip: Given your adventurous palate and love for complex flavors, focus on the unique Chambourcin and the multi-varietal Red Barn Blend to explore new taste experiences.

recommendations.why: This wine perfectly matches your preference for dark cherry flavors with chocolate notes and offers a medium-full body that aligns with your palate profile.
recommendations.name: 2023 Barbera

recommendations.why: This Merlot-based blend delivers the dark fruit complexity you enjoy with plum and black pepper spice notes, matching your favorite red blend style.
recommendations.name: 2023 Red Barn Blend

recommendations.why: This adventurous varietal offers the plum and wild berry flavors you love while satisfying your high adventurousness with a unique grape variety.
recommendations.name: 2022 Chambourcin

fields.tasting_notes: This ancient grape produced an enchanting wine. The aromas of crushed stone, peach skin, and fresh apple dance with hints of honeysuckle. On the palate, experience a tantalizing burst of vibrancy, accentuated by flavors of stone fruit with a subtle touch of spice.
10th Anniversary Red Wine Blend with deep notes of dark cherry, blackberry, licorice and baking spice. Palate lavished with dark fruit, toasted oak and spice with velvety tannins.
Aromas of coffee and chocolate. Flavors of blackberry and plum. Medium tannins.

This sparkling wine dazzles with its fresh, invigorating profile and delicate elegance. On the nose, enticing aromas of tropical fruits like pineapple and guava mingle harmoniously with subtle hints of white flowers, creating a bouquet that is both vibrant and refined.
Elegant and concentrated red wine with aromas of dark cherry and plum framed by vanilla bean and shaved chocolate. The velvety palate sings with bramble fruit, cherry, spice, and cracked pepper.

A blend of 3 vintages of Merlot from our estate. Medium core and garnet to show some youth, this wine opens with notes of dried herbs, red licorice and ripe plum. On first sip, you find this to be a very round, full bodied wine that has cherry, baking spice, and cola all along the finish.
A beautiful crisp naked Chardonnay with aromas of pear and star fruit. This wine is medium bodied and full of ripe pear, pineapple and peach preserve on the finish.

This split-ferment of oak and stainless steel features profound aromas of vanilla, baking spice, ginseng, honey, and ripe tropical fruits. Segway to flavors that remind us of grilled, spiced pineapple consistent with Brazilian steakhouses around the world.

fields.name: Northern NC Wine Trail Adventure
fields.description: A perfect afternoon exploring three exceptional wineries with great red and white wines, beautiful settings, and opportunities for live music

fields.notes: Perfect starting point with great variety of red and white wines in a beautiful setting
Family-owned vineyard with excellent wine selection and frequent live music events - exactly 20 minutes from your first stop
Beautiful mountain setting with exceptional wines - perfect finale with stunning views and great atmosphere

preferences.summary: You tend to gravitate toward medium to full-bodied wines with complex flavor profiles, showing a particular appreciation for both elegant reds with dark fruit characteristics and unique white varietals. Your palate enjoys wines that balance fruit-forward flavors with interesting spice and mineral notes, and you're not afraid to explore lesser-known grape varieties.
recommendations: Petit Verdot - for bold dark fruit flavors with spice complexity
Viognier - to explore more aromatic whites with stone fruit character
Port or late harvest Zinfandel - given your appreciation for dessert wines
Tempranillo - for medium-full body with cherry and spice notes
Orange wine or skin-contact whites - to satisfy your adventurous palate
